canvas.name: Life (compound cells, pure primitives inside)
canvas.description: 3×3 toroidal Conway's Game of Life. Each cell is a `compound Cell_x_y` declared inside a `for` loop; the compound's interior is the same 10-primitive pure-primitive Conway recipe (Tick + Switch + ConstantPacket + FanOut + Aggregator + Filter + ConstantSignal). Compound cells render as labeled boxes — double-click to drill in and see the primitives inside.
